title: draba frigida var. laevipes
intro: Draba frigida var. laevipes, also known as a mountain whitlowgrass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe irritated skin, and promote wound healing. Draba frigida var. laevipes can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine.
